UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-23-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Hok Ming Lau is present.
Attorney Brenda Cruz Keith appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Elvira Zayas is present.
Attorney Jerome Schweich representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jean Mileff, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of MAR-26-2012 is vacated.
